title: CAREASSIST - 211info
text: CAREASSIST CAREASSIST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance paying for insurance premiums, prescriptions, and medical service co-pays. Assists with 100% payments for a limited number of medical services and medications necessary for HIV treatment for uninsured persons. 800 NE Oregon Street #1105 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: HIV positive Oregonians with income up to 550% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm by appointment only Email (971) 673-0144 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 673-0144 FAX (971) 673-0177 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From MAX Blue Line, use the NE 7th stop and walk one block south. Also accessible via the A and B Loop Streetcar, or TriMet bus line 6. Services: Disease/Disability Information * AIDS/HIV Health Insurance Premium Assistance * AIDS/HIV Medical Care Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV Prescription Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CAREASSIST
